title: sigprocmask Function Operation Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating how the sigprocmask function is used to change and inspect the calling process's signal mask, which determines which signals are currently blocked.
relationships: Process calls sigprocmask with how, set, and oldset parameters
Function sends request to Kernel to modify signal mask
Kernel updates the process's blocked signal set based on the operation specified by 'how' and the signal set 'set'
Previous signal mask is stored in oldset if provided
Process continues with new signal mask active
